title: [release-1.3] Bump to Skopeo v1.3.2-dev
body:
Bump the release branch version to the next numbered dev.

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: I did not think we did this on release branched only on the main branch?

Ah, it’s possible that this was an intentional decision — I can’t remember such a rule, and the history is not consistent.

(We have no written policy AFAICS, at least not in the repo.)

I guess this makes sense to prevent people from accidently releasing a -dev branch
LGTM
